sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἡγεμονία

- Transliteration: hegemonia

- Phonetic: hayg-em-on-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. chief command, rule, sovereignty

a. of the reign of a Roman emperor

- Origin: from G2232

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G2232; government that is (in time) official term: - reign.
